name: Spaghetti Bolognese
instructions: Boil pasta. Cook ground beef with onion and garlic. Add tomato sauce and simmer 20 minutes. Combine with pasta and serve.

name: Chicken Alfredo
instructions: Cook pasta. Sauté chicken. Add cream, butter, and parmesan to make sauce. Combine with pasta.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
instructions: Heat oil in pan. Add vegetables and stir fry. Add soy sauce and cook until tender. Serve over rice.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Cook ground beef with spices. Warm tortillas. Fill with beef, lettuce, cheese, and salsa.

name: Grilled Chicken Salad
instructions: Grill chicken. Toss lettuce, tomatoes, and cucumber. Slice chicken and place on top. Add dressing.

name: Shrimp Scampi
instructions: Cook pasta. Sauté shrimp in butter and garlic. Add lemon juice. Toss with pasta.

name: Fried Rice
instructions: Cook rice. Scramble eggs. Stir fry vegetables. Add rice and soy sauce. Mix well.

name: Omelette
instructions: Beat eggs. Pour into pan. Add cheese and vegetables. Fold and cook.

name: Chicken Curry
instructions: Cook chicken with onion, garlic, and spices. Add coconut milk. Simmer until tender. Serve with rice.

name: Caprese Sandwich
instructions: Layer mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil on bread. Drizzle with olive oil.

name: Beef Stir Fry
